# default

path `default` · uuid `4571afd1-034a-8ae4-9083-c9782058b045` · diamond `b3a36ae5-c472-8381-9cea-ae5a16cbeaf8`

analysis —
law nothing defines a default — the default is by architecture. A defined default (a hardcoded fallback — `|| x`, `?? x`, `= literal`) is an assumption, hence entropy; the architecture (the content-uuid, the path, the computed structure) already determines the value, so derive it, never assign it. The collider has no default for exactly this reason — computed-not-hardcoded at every scale.
